visa.notes: Lowest income threshold in EU. A2 Portuguese for permanent residency after 5 years.

rent.gigInternetNotes: Portugal 95% FTTH coverage (ANACOM, Q3 2025). Lisbon metro 99.9% penetration. Algarve at 95.8% and growing. Three-way ISP competition. Fiber is default infrastructure. Essentially no rent premium.

electricity.notes: EDP/Endesa. Moderate A/C in summer (Lisbon 85°F). Electric heating in winter. 6% IVA on first 150kWh, 23% above.

gas.notes: Galp/EDP. Natural gas or butano for cooking/water heater. Mild winters, less heating.

water.notes: EPAL (Lisbon) / municipal. Includes saneamento (sewage) and resíduos (waste) as line items. 6% IVA.

sewage.notes: Included in water bill as saneamento.

trash.notes: Included in water bill as taxa de resíduos sólidos.

utilities.taxes: IVA: 6% on electricity (≤150kWh), 23% above; 6% on water; 23% on gas. All included in bills.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig). Trash included in rent. Sewage included in water bill.

healthcare.notes: SNS public healthcare after NHR/D7 visa residency. Private insurance optional (~€80-120/person/mo with pre-existing conditions). Anti-VEGF injections available through SNS hospitals. Pre-existing condition loading on private plans. GLP-1 covered through SNS for diabetes.

petDaycare.notes: Hired pet sitter 2 days/week (~€26/visit). Limited commercial daycare in Greater Lisbon. In-home pet sitting via Rover.com, PetSitting.pt, local services. Algarve has fewer options than Lisbon.

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, NFL RedZone (DAZN), dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: Google Fi Flexible (US Number) + WTF by NOS (Local). 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: SNS covers specialist visits (€4.50 taxa moderadora) and hospital-based anti-VEGF injections. Private labs: €15-30 per panel. Frequent monitoring needed: ophthalmologist, endocrinologist. Prescription copays income-based; 95% reimbursement for pensioners.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

stateIncomeTax.label: Portuguese Income Tax (IRS)
stateIncomeTax.exemptions: NHR ended Jan 2024 (IFICI replacement excludes pensions). Foreign pensions/retirement income taxed at standard progressive rates 12.5-48%. US-Portugal treaty provides foreign tax credit.

taxes.notes: NHR ended 2024. Pensions taxed at standard rates 12.5-48%. US-Portugal tax treaty for foreign tax credit.

exchangeRates.note: EUR per 1 USD. Based on 2016-2026 historical range. Optimistic = strong EUR (good for USD→EUR), Pessimistic = weak EUR.
